title: Simplify pass 3 - congress.html and tasks.html UI

log.context: Simplify pass 3 - congress.html and tasks.html UI

Done. Here's what was fixed and why:

**congress.html:**
- Removed `loadSessionList()` entirely (~50 lines). This function fetched sessions for the old center-column session list, which was replaced by the sidebar. The panel it targeted has `display: none !important` and the function had zero call sites — pure dead code.
- Fixed `renderSessionStatus()` to use the same guarded dot-class pattern as `loadSidebarSessionList`. Previously it did `'status-dot ' + st` unconditionally, which would add a ...(truncated)
